title: Croydon Health Services: antenatal and newborn screening
body: "Quality assurance (QA) visits are carried out by the Public Health England screening quality assurance service (SQAS).  The evidence for this report comes from:   outine monitoring data collected by the NHS screening programmes data and reports from external organisations evidence submitted by the provider(s), commissioner and external organisations information shared with the London SQAS as part of the visit process   "
